project_type: Next.js 16 App Router multi-tenant SaaS CRM
build_system: npm with Next.js build pipeline, Drizzle ORM for DB
verification_instructions: Run npx tsc --noEmit in the project root and ensure 0 errors
environment_constraints: No database available (no Docker daemon, no PostgreSQL). Validation must use TypeScript compilation only. Cannot run next build (requires DB at build time).
contribution_requirements: All code must pass tsc --noEmit with strict mode. Follow existing patterns for schema utilities, API route handlers, and UI components.
key_patterns: Schema files in drizzle/schema/ use utils.ts helpers (pk(), tenantId(), lifecycle(), audit(), metadata(), tenantIdx, metadataIdx, activeIdx). API routes use requireAuth() middleware returning AuthContext. UI pages are client components using fetch() to API routes. Integrations have a registry pattern with ProviderDefinition types.
directory_structure: drizzle/schema/ = DB schemas, lib/ = business logic, app/api/tenant/ = API routes, app/tenant/ = UI pages, components/ = shared components
